_comment: Defense stat weights by position. Blended: 50% original estimates + 50% S11 OLS regression (normalized to 0.12 scale). Regression source: positional fielding value OLS with R² quality checks.

C.name: Catcher
C.description: Awareness only. The one defense stat that matters for catchers.

1B.name: First Base
1B.description: Reaction for scooping throws. Composure for error avoidance. Awareness for double-play turns (1B takes the final out of most DPs).

2B.name: Second Base
2B.description: Reaction-dominant. Awareness and composure contribute marginally.

SS.name: Shortstop
SS.description: Reaction for ground balls. Composure under pressure. Arm for relay throws.

3B.name: Third Base
3B.description: Reaction-dominant hot corner. Composure and awareness are minor factors.

LF.name: Left Field
LF.description: Acrobatics for catches. Agility for range. Arm for throws home. Dexterity contributes.

CF.name: Center Field
CF.description: Acrobatics for catches. Agility for range. Arm for throws.

RF.name: Right Field
RF.description: Acrobatics for catches. Arm for throws to third. Agility for range. Dexterity contributes.
